code:
import io
import string

fn is_space_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut output = ""
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut first_out = true

  while i < n
    while i < n and is_space_at(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut j = i
      while j < n and not is_space_at(line, j)
        j = j + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(line, i, j)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if not has_prev or v != prev
          if first_out
            output = "#{v}"
            first_out = false
          else
            output = "#{output} #{v}"
          end
          prev = v
          has_prev = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = j
    end
  end

  println(output)
end
